productDisplayName: Enroute Men Casual Navy Blue Casual Shoe
description: Crafted with high quality leather by European designers, these shoes from enroute are passionately created to help you stay ahead of the trend. Team this with casual denims and a comfortable t-shirts. This pair comes with a shoe bag and plastic tongue. Upper Leather and overlays with a red and white tape across the midfoot for absolute durability and style Padded tongue and collar for enhanced comfort Lace-up system for a snug and customised Fit Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfort Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole with lugs in the form of the letters SHOES for maximum grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
